# DoorClosedLocked

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::DoorClosedLocked;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        DoorClosedLocked { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
entrance, entry, exit, ingress, egress, gate, gateway, emergency exit, lock

## Categories
home, travel, security
